task_completion.description: Create a tiddler titled 'Smith Wedding Setlist'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The TiddlyWiki interface shows a tiddler with the exact title 'Smith Wedding Setlist' open in either edit or view mode.

task_completion.description: Include the three required section headings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tiddler body contains the text '! Cocktail Hour', '! Dinner', and '! Dance Floor' (visible as markdown in edit mode or rendered as headings in view mode).

task_completion.description: Create a dynamic list for the Cocktail Hour section with the correct filter criteria.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the tiddler edit mode, under the Cocktail Hour heading, there is a `<$list>` widget with a filter checking for vibe 'Chill', genre 'Jazz' or 'Acoustic', sorting by title (e.g., `sort[title]`), and excluding the 'DoNotPlay' tag (e.g., `!tag[DoNotPlay]`).

task_completion.description: Create a dynamic list for the Dinner section with the correct filter criteria.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the tiddler edit mode, under the Dinner heading, there is a `<$list>` widget with a filter checking for vibe 'Romantic', sorting by artist (e.g., `sort[artist]`), and excluding the 'DoNotPlay' tag.

task_completion.description: Create a dynamic list for the Dance Floor section with the correct filter criteria.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the tiddler edit mode, under the Dance Floor heading, there is a `<$list>` widget with a filter checking for vibe 'Party', tempo 'Fast', sorting by title, and excluding the 'DoNotPlay' tag.

task_completion.description: Format each list item dynamically without hardcoding song titles or artists.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the `<$list>` widgets in edit mode, the formatting is written as a bullet point with a link and transcluded artist field, such as `* <$link/> by {{!!artist}}`. No specific song titles or artist names should be hardcoded in the text.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the TiddlyWiki GUI in a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the TiddlyWiki web interface being used to create and edit the tiddler, rather than terminal commands or a text editor modifying backend files.

integrity.description: The agent used TiddlyWiki widgets rather than hardcoding the song lists.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tiddler edit mode shows `<$list>` widgets and filter expressions. The agent did not manually type out a static list of specific song titles and artists.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely typed out the filters and formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively typing or editing the tiddler content within the TiddlyWiki text area.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected tiddler title is exactly 'Smith Wedding Setlist'. The required headings are '! Cocktail Hour', '! Dinner', and '! Dance Floor'. All dynamic lists must exclude songs tagged with 'DoNotPlay'.
